required_skills: Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data
Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical analysis
Develop dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, or similar tools
Write optimized SQL queries to extract and analyze data
Generate reports and present findings to stakeholders
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and compliance
missing_skills: Collect, clean, and preprocess structured and unstructured data
Perform exploratory data analysis (EDA) and statistical analysis
Develop dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, or similar tools
Write optimized SQL queries to extract and analyze data
Generate reports and present findings to stakeholders
Ensure data accuracy, integrity, and compliance

questions.question: Which statement would be the most credible answer for a Data Analyst candidate discussing SQL?
options: Say that SQL is important but avoid discussing any implementation details or outcomes.
Explain a concrete use case, tradeoffs, and how you validated the outcome when using SQL.
Give a memorized definition of SQL without examples, tradeoffs, or project context.
Claim SQL is mostly handled automatically so deep understanding is unnecessary.
